message:
feat(engine): add 209 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Fourth batch of enrichment tests:

- budgeted_synthesis_engine: 34 tests (synthesis configs, kernel
  schemas, equivalence proofs, cost models, budget enforcement)
- category_shift_report: 38 tests (shift categories, severity levels,
  report generation, timeline tracking, summary rendering)
- causal_intervention_dag: 55 tests (DAG construction, adjustment sets,
  identifiability certificates, intervention planning, causal uplift)
- causal_regret_evidence_gate: 38 tests (regret estimation, evidence
  accumulation, gate evaluation, policy comparison, verdicts)
- causal_uplift_evidence_gate: 44 tests (uplift estimation, confidence
  envelopes, gate decisions, policy ranking, evidence binding)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
